description_long: This is a compact, two-story modern house with a flat roof and a geometric, angular facade. The exterior is predominantly white with black trim, featuring a small fenced yard and a prominent front entryway with steps leading up to the door. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, with some bay-style projections and metal bars on select windows for added security. A staircase is visible on one side, providing access to the upper level from the exterior. The house is surrounded by a low, black-and-white fence, and the overall design is minimalist with clean lines and a functional layout. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or stucco, with metal and glass elements for windows and railings.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, black trim, asymmetrical windows, and a fenced yard. Features include a prominent front entry, exterior staircase, and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, bay window, and fenced yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the exterior staircase and additional windows.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain wall, back entrance, and part of the fence visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more windows and the continuation of the fence.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with steps, bay window, and minimal overhang, framed by a low fence
